title: Team Byte: The Backrooms (Client)
description:
Our insanity is the limit.

This is a client-side modpack for our MMO RPG Minecraft server themed after the "Backrooms" creepypasta.
body:
# Team Byte: The Backrooms – Client Mod Pack

This mod pack is made just for players of The Backrooms server! It adds a custom main menu that makes joining the server super easy — just launch the game and click to join. No need to mess with server lists anymore.

## Why use it?

- **No more reloading the resource pack** every time you hop on or off the server—it's built right in.
- **Built in Voice Chat** that work on the server.
- **Slight HUD tweaks** to make things feel cleaner and easier to read.
- And of course, **the custom menu** looks awesome and fits the spooky Backrooms vibe perfectly.

It’s a simple mod pack, but it makes playing on the server smoother and more immersive. Definitely worth using if you're a regular!
